name: Rave Heart+
short_description: Rave Heart+ is a turn-based sci-fi RPG that takes you on an epic journey through the galaxy of Xerxes. Experience the rebirth of this classic adventure, where deep emotions, thrilling battles, and galactic secrets await among the stars.
detailed_description:
Rave Heart+ is the definitive edition of the 2020 space RPG, bringing together the best of the original adventure with enhanced visuals, rebalanced gameplay, additional content, and an exclusive soundtrack. Rediscover this thrilling story like never before.

SYNOPSIS

Rave Heart+ is a thrilling sci-fi RPG where classic turn-based battles meet a gripping, character-driven story. Play as Klein Cryoz, a telekinetic Cipher and protector of Princess Ellemine Rave, suddenly swept into a galactic crisis that threatens the entire Xerxes system.

Uncover the buried truths of Klein’s forgotten past, confront political conspiracies and deadly enemies, and make choices that will shape the destiny of the galaxy.

A classic RPG experience with a sci-fi edge, packed with twists, emotional moments, and intense battles.

FEATURES

  • New CG illustrations highlighting major story moments

  • Professional voice actors bringing key characters to life

  • 30+ hours of total gameplay

  • Steam Cloud support

  • Supports Steam Achievements

  • New playable and story characters

  • Overhauled encounter system, no more random battles

  • New character artwork by Surya Raka

  • New original soundtrack created for this edition

  • Enhanced 2D visuals and improved map presentation

  • Refined turn-based battle effects and animations

  • Rebalanced encounters and smoother progression

  • Updated UI elements for a cleaner experience

  • Additional optional content and bonus events

  • Improved performance and quality-of-life updates

Are you ready to follow your heart across the stars?

Choose your destiny. Face the truth. Rave Heart+ awaits.
